scopeProgress.title: Focused Webhook Regression And Quality Gates

executionHistory.summary: Created analyst-owned spec.md for the ntfy notification source adapter and recorded dependency on spec 054 source-neutral notification handler contract.

Added inline UX Wireframes and User Flows for ntfy source health, subscription status, topic list, lag, reconnect state, dead-letter review, replay confirmation, redacted errors, troubleshooting, and source/output-channel boundary clarity.

Created design.md for the ntfy notification source adapter, defining adapter architecture, SourceEventEnvelope mapping, SST and secret handling, topic health, reconnect, lag, dead-letter, replay, operator APIs, UI data flow, security, observability, tests, and rollout while leaving plan and implementation incomplete.

Created planning-owned scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, and scenario-manifest.json for six sequential spec 055 scopes. Implementation remains not started, all scope DoD items are unchecked, and certification has no completed scopes or certified phases.

Implemented focused spec 055 production webhook receiver/route and runtime startup wiring from NTFY_SOURCES_JSON. Evidence recorded in report.md#implementation-gap-evidence-2026-05-24-production-webhook-and-runtime-startup. Certification fields remain unmodified for validate ownership.

Repaired planning-owned artifact structure after focused ntfy webhook/runtime implementation: added Scope 7-9 scope progress mappings, scenario manifest requiredTestType fields, and evidence references without promoting final validation certification.

Recorded test-phase evidence for focused ntfy unit, integration, e2e, stress, format, lint, skip-marker, live-test authenticity, and regression-quality checks. Certification remains in_progress because DoD completion was not promoted.
Recorded docs-phase evidence for managed documentation updates covering ntfy API, operations, testing, development, architecture, and product design surfaces.
Recorded stabilize-phase evidence for the shared search stress prelude recovery rerun; no source or test harness code changes were certified by this state repair.

Recorded regression-phase evidence and REG-055-001 closure rerun for source-neutral boundary, integration, e2e, stress, lint, format, skip-marker, and deployment-surface regression checks. REG-055-002 certification artifact work remains open for planning/test/validation routing.

Repaired planning-owned certification artifacts for REG-055-002: aligned scopeProgress for Scopes 1-6, mapped existing phase provenance for test/docs/stabilize/regression, removed stale Test Plan gap prose from file-path-sensitive rows, and preserved unchecked DoD items for owner validation.

Ran post-implementation simplification for spec 055 ntfy adapter: clarified JSON config assembly, centralized ntfy redaction-state construction, simplified loop metadata extraction, removed redundant retry-budget fallback behavior after validation, required replay actor identity, and recorded focused unit/integration/e2e/stress/lint/format evidence in report.md#simplification-evidence-2026-05-24-ntfy-adapter-post-implementation-pass. Certification fields remain unchanged.

Ran security and secret/log-surface verification for the ntfy adapter. Focused unit, integration, and e2e selectors passed for current redaction/no-output-coupling coverage, but security found high-severity replayable dead-letter RawPayload exposure through operator API JSON and routed remediation to implementation/test/docs. Certification fields remain unchanged.

Reran security closure verification after SEC-055-001 and SEC-055-002 remediation. Focused unit, e2e, integration, artifact lint, and traceability guard commands passed. SEC-055-001 and SEC-055-002 are closed for the reviewed operator API/docs surfaces; certification fields remain unchanged.

Ran ntfy resilience chaos verification with seed 20260524 plus focused no-output-coupling and live stress guards. Created BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 after replay bursts showed replay attempt rows are idempotent but repeated SourceEventSink side effects still create multiple raw events. Certification fields remain unchanged and implementation routing is required.

Implemented BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 replay idempotency repair: dead-letter replay now locks before SourceEventSink side effects, repeated successful replays return the existing accepted attempt, failed attempts remain retryable, and focused unit/integration/e2e/stress/lint/format evidence is recorded in the bug report. Certification fields remain unchanged.

Reran BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 closure verification. The temporary seed 20260524 chaos replay probe, focused ntfy stress selectors, live replay E2E selector, bug artifact lint, spec artifact lint, and traceability guard passed. Active bug ledger moved BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 to chaos_verified resolved state; certification fields remain unchanged.

Ran final audit for spec 055. Artifact lint, traceability guard, implementation reality scan, regression-quality guards, focused ntfy unit/integration/e2e/stress selectors, bug artifact lint, and security/docs spot checks found no new critical implementation, security, docs, or focused-test gap. State-transition promotion remains blocked by seven unchecked DoD items, six in-progress scopes, evidence-signal warnings, and validation-owned certification fields; certification remains unpromoted.

Validated the seven remaining Scope 1, Scope 4, and Scope 6 DoD items against later implementation, test, security, chaos, and audit evidence; manually classified evidence-signal warnings as stale planning/interpreted sections not used for promotion; certified Scopes 1-9 and promoted spec 055 to done_with_concerns because historical report evidence fences need cleanup but do not contradict the latest executed evidence.

Full-delivery spec-review recertification checked parent spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, and state.json against the implemented ntfy adapter and BUG-CHAOS child. Runtime behavior and child replay/G048 repairs align with the final contract, but active status/current-state prose in parent planning artifacts and historical report evidence fences required docs/governance cleanup before validate-owned final promotion. See spec-review.md.

Reconciled stale active status/current-state prose in parent spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md; demoted historical low-signal report fences in parent and BUG-CHAOS reports while preserving transcript text; reran required parent and child artifact lint, traceability guard, and state-transition guard in blocked state. Final certification remains validate-owned.

Pre-promotion parent and child artifact-lint, traceability guard, and state-transition guard runs permitted done status, but the post-edit parent state-transition guard blocked final done promotion at Gate G088 because spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md are still uncommitted planning-truth edits. Child BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 was promoted to done; parent remains blocked for current spec-review/stable-planning certification.

Post-docs/governance spec-review recertification checked the current dirty parent spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md against the implemented ntfy adapter and validate-certified BUG-CHAOS child state. The active parent planning truth is current and coherent with implemented behavior; final parent promotion remains validate-owned for certification metadata and guard reruns. See spec-review.md.

Attempted final parent promotion after current-session parent artifact-lint, traceability guard, and pre-promotion state-transition guard permitted the transition following spec-review CURRENT recertification. Post-promotion state-transition guard blocked at Gate G088 because uncommitted WORKTREE planning-truth edits in spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md are treated as post-certification edits under done state. Parent remains blocked; observations are preserved.

Completed final parent promotion after commit ebff7226 stabilized the recertified planning truth in git. Parent artifact-lint passed, traceability guard passed with 0 warnings, pre-promotion post-cert-spec-edit guard passed for blocked state, and state-transition guard permitted done with one non-blocking warning before validate-owned certification metadata was refreshed. Post-edit guard reruns are recorded by the current validate invocation.

OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed post-cert planning edit fb2a4266 (2026-06-01 'spec 064: open-ended knowledge agent + supporting work'): only change to this spec is an +11-line 'Design Successor Note' prepended to design.md that points future outbound channels to the spec 061/069 TransportAdapter contract while explicitly stating 'This spec stays done' and 'This spec still owns ntfy-specific source ingestion'. Pure cross-reference/successor note; category b. No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.

resolvedBugs.summary: Repeated ntfy dead-letter replay returns the existing accepted attempt and does not repeat source-sink side effects after a successful replay. Seed 20260524 closure rerun showed replay_attempt_rows=1, replay_raw=1, replay_normalized=1. G048 redaction_state decode rework is repaired and validate-certified in the standalone bug packet.

failures.summary: Three replay calls for one replay-eligible ntfy dead-letter produced three accepted raw event IDs while replay_attempt_rows remained 1.

routing.constraint: Final parent certification completed after the recertified planning truth was stabilized in commit ebff7226; no owner route remains.

notes: Docs/governance cleanup reconciled parent active status/current-state prose and demoted low-signal historical report fences while preserving transcript text. Post-cleanup spec-review recertified parent spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md as CURRENT against implemented ntfy behavior and the done BUG-CHAOS child. Commit ebff7226 stabilized the recertified planning truth in git, making the prior G088 WORKTREE blocker obsolete. Validate promoted the parent to done with refreshed certification metadata; no proposal recreation or runtime/source/config/deploy change was made.
